TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit RuntimeEnvironment extends System.Object
public ref class RuntimeEnvironment abstract sealed

Docs.summary: Provides a collection of methods that return information about the common language runtime environment.

remarks.format:
## Examples This example shows how to call many of the methods defined by the <xref:System.Runtime.InteropServices.RuntimeEnvironment> class.
:::code language="cpp" source="~/snippets/cpp/VS_Snippets_CLR/RuntimeEnvironment/cpp/RuntimeEnvironment.cpp" id="Snippet1"::: :::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Runtime.InteropServices/RuntimeEnvironment/Overview/RuntimeEnvironment.cs" id="Snippet1"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/System.Runtime.InteropServices/RuntimeEnvironment/Overview/RuntimeEnvironment.vb" id="Snippet1":::

MemberSignature.Value: public static bool FromGlobalAccessCache (System.Reflection.Assembly a);
.method public static hidebysig bool FromGlobalAccessCache(class System.Reflection.Assembly a) cil managed
Public Shared Function FromGlobalAccessCache (a As Assembly) As Boolean
static member FromGlobalAccessCache : System.Reflection.Assembly -> bool
public: static bool FromGlobalAccessCache(System::Reflection::Assembly ^ a);

Docs.summary: Tests whether the specified assembly is loaded in the global assembly cache.
Docs.returns: if the assembly is loaded in the global assembly cache; otherwise, .

remarks.format:
## Examples The following example demonstrates calling the <xref:System.Runtime.InteropServices.RuntimeEnvironment.FromGlobalAccessCache*> method. This code example is part of a larger example provided for the <xref:System.Runtime.InteropServices.RuntimeEnvironment> class.
:::code language="cpp" source="~/snippets/cpp/VS_Snippets_CLR/RuntimeEnvironment/cpp/RuntimeEnvironment.cpp" id="Snippet2"::: :::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Runtime.InteropServices/RuntimeEnvironment/Overview/RuntimeEnvironment.cs" id="Snippet2"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/System.Runtime.InteropServices/RuntimeEnvironment/Overview/RuntimeEnvironment.vb" id="Snippet2":::

MemberSignature.Value: public static string GetRuntimeDirectory ();
.method public static hidebysig string GetRuntimeDirectory() cil managed
Public Shared Function GetRuntimeDirectory () As String
static member GetRuntimeDirectory : unit -> string
public: static System::String ^ GetRuntimeDirectory();

Docs.summary: Returns the directory where the common language runtime is installed.
Docs.returns: A string that contains the path to the directory where the common language runtime is installed.

remarks.format:
## Examples The following example demonstrates calling the <xref:System.Runtime.InteropServices.RuntimeEnvironment.GetRuntimeDirectory*> method. This code example is part of a larger example provided for the <xref:System.Runtime.InteropServices.RuntimeEnvironment> class.
:::code language="cpp" source="~/snippets/cpp/VS_Snippets_CLR/RuntimeEnvironment/cpp/RuntimeEnvironment.cpp" id="Snippet3"::: :::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Runtime.InteropServices/RuntimeEnvironment/Overview/RuntimeEnvironment.cs" id="Snippet3"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/System.Runtime.InteropServices/RuntimeEnvironment/Overview/RuntimeEnvironment.vb" id="Snippet3":::

Public Shared Function GetRuntimeInterfaceAsIntPtr (clsid As Guid, riid As Guid) As IntPtr
static member GetRuntimeInterfaceAsIntPtr : Guid * Guid -> nativeint
public: static IntPtr GetRuntimeInterfaceAsIntPtr(Guid clsid, Guid riid);

Attribute.AttributeName: [System.Obsolete("RuntimeEnvironment members SystemConfigurationFile, GetRuntimeInterfaceAsIntPtr, and GetRuntimeInterfaceAsObject are not supported and throw PlatformNotSupportedException.", DiagnosticId="SYSLIB0019", UrlFormat="https://aka.ms/dotnet-warnings/{0}")]

[<System.Obsolete("RuntimeEnvironment members SystemConfigurationFile, GetRuntimeInterfaceAsIntPtr, and GetRuntimeInterfaceAsObject are not supported and throw PlatformNotSupportedException.", DiagnosticId="SYSLIB0019", UrlFormat="https://aka.ms/dotnet-warnings/{0}")>]

Docs.param: The identifier for the desired class.
The identifier for the desired interface.
Docs.summary: Returns the specified interface on the specified class.
Docs.returns: An unmanaged pointer to the requested interface.

MemberSignature.Value: public static object GetRuntimeInterfaceAsObject (Guid clsid, Guid riid);
.method public static hidebysig object GetRuntimeInterfaceAsObject(valuetype System.Guid clsid, valuetype System.Guid riid) cil managed
Public Shared Function GetRuntimeInterfaceAsObject (clsid As Guid, riid As Guid) As Object
static member GetRuntimeInterfaceAsObject : Guid * Guid -> obj
public: static System::Object ^ GetRuntimeInterfaceAsObject(Guid clsid, Guid riid);

Attribute.AttributeName: [System.Obsolete("RuntimeEnvironment members SystemConfigurationFile, GetRuntimeInterfaceAsIntPtr, and GetRuntimeInterfaceAsObject are not supported and throw PlatformNotSupportedException.", DiagnosticId="SYSLIB0019", UrlFormat="https://aka.ms/dotnet-warnings/{0}")]

[<System.Obsolete("RuntimeEnvironment members SystemConfigurationFile, GetRuntimeInterfaceAsIntPtr, and GetRuntimeInterfaceAsObject are not supported and throw PlatformNotSupportedException.", DiagnosticId="SYSLIB0019", UrlFormat="https://aka.ms/dotnet-warnings/{0}")>]

Docs.param: The identifier for the desired class.
The identifier for the desired interface.
Docs.summary: Returns an instance of a type that represents a COM object by a pointer to its interface.
Docs.returns: An object that represents the specified unmanaged COM object.

MemberSignature.Value: public static string GetSystemVersion ();
.method public static hidebysig string GetSystemVersion() cil managed
Public Shared Function GetSystemVersion () As String
static member GetSystemVersion : unit -> string
public: static System::String ^ GetSystemVersion();

Docs.summary: Gets the version number of the common language runtime that's running the current process.
Docs.returns: A string containing the version number of the common language runtime.
Docs.remarks: On .NET 8 and later, this method returns v concatenated with , which is the version of the CLR. For example: v8.0.0.

MemberSignature.Value: public static string SystemConfigurationFile { get; }
.property string SystemConfigurationFile
Public Shared ReadOnly Property SystemConfigurationFile As String
static member SystemConfigurationFile : string
public: static property System::String ^ SystemConfigurationFile { System::String ^ get(); };

Attribute.AttributeName: [System.Obsolete("RuntimeEnvironment members SystemConfigurationFile, GetRuntimeInterfaceAsIntPtr, and GetRuntimeInterfaceAsObject are not supported and throw PlatformNotSupportedException.", DiagnosticId="SYSLIB0019", UrlFormat="https://aka.ms/dotnet-warnings/{0}")]

[<System.Obsolete("RuntimeEnvironment members SystemConfigurationFile, GetRuntimeInterfaceAsIntPtr, and GetRuntimeInterfaceAsObject are not supported and throw PlatformNotSupportedException.", DiagnosticId="SYSLIB0019", UrlFormat="https://aka.ms/dotnet-warnings/{0}")>]

Docs.summary: Gets the path to the system configuration file.
Docs.value: The path to the system configuration file.
